description: Use this API to tabulate summaries of Saved Case and/or Snapshot Files. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = show(option, sfile)

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: Code for the type(s) of files to report. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of saved case or snapshot file (when option is 0). (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: SFILE is blank when OPTION is 0.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
